method: Monte Carlo (50k sims). All cache xpts=0 (only Sels=1), so candidates modeled by season-class (APEX-proven cum_pts-leader captaincy signal) + medical-confirmed start probability + role/fixture, NOT raw xpts. NOTE: prior sim-lab.json recommended Haaland C — invalid for GW38: medical-bay confirms Haaland UNAVAILABLE (rested for World Cup), cannot be captained or auto-subbed.

captain_rankings.recommendation: CAPTAIN. Season-long elite premium and the proven cum_pts-leader signal. Highest EV (6.75) and highest ceiling (17) of the pool. Confirmed starter in Liverpool farewell with Champions-League-qualification motivation. Also the current VC, so already auto-sub cover.

STRONG VC / current C. Highest start probability (92%), confirmed starter at home vs Leeds with two recent double-figure London Stadium hauls. Excellent armband but ceiling and EV trail Salah; he is recent-form-led, the historically weaker signal.
Differential third option. Clear to start (Brentford injury list elsewhere), good ceiling but lower season class than Salah/Bowen. Not the pick.
Avoid as captain. Confirmed starter but faces Man City (hardest fixture in pool), capping floor and ceiling.
Avoid as captain. Lowest EV; Forest dead-rubber rotation risk drops start probability to 80% (worst floor in pool).

tc_analysis.rationale: GW38 is the final gameweek — TC is a use-it-or-lose-it chip with zero opportunity cost remaining. APEX TC timing rule ideally wants a confirmed DGW (play twice); no DGW exists in GW38, so this is a sub-optimal-but-forced spot. With no future to save it for, deploying TC on the highest-EV, highest-ceiling confirmed starter is strictly +EV vs wasting the chip. Salah is the pick: EV(C) 13.5 vs EV(TC) ~20.3, season-leading premium, 90% start, elite ceiling (17). A Bowen-TC (92% start, slightly safer floor) is a defensible safer alternative, but Salah maximizes expected and ceiling points.
tc_analysis.note: If confirmed lineups show Salah rested/rotated, pivot TC to Bowen (92% start).

summary: GW38 final-week Monte Carlo (50k sims, season-class model since all cache xpts=0): Salah is the captain — highest EV (6.75/13.5 captained), highest ceiling (17), tied-best floor (2), confirmed in his Liverpool farewell with CL motivation, and the season-long elite premium (the APEX-proven cum_pts-leader signal that generalizes on unseen data). Bowen is the VC: highest start probability (92%) and a confirmed home haul threat vs Leeds, but recent-form-led and lower ceiling. Use the Triple Captain on Salah: GW38 is the last GW so the chip has no future value, no DGW exists to optimize for, and TC on the top-EV confirmed starter (~20.3 expected) beats letting it expire. Caveat: Raya is OUT (Arsenal title rotation) so Sels is the auto-sub GK; Haaland UNAVAILABLE cannot cover captain — Salah-as-VC already gives Bowen-independent armband cover, and the prior sim-lab.json Haaland-C recommendation is invalid for GW38.
